name: Arknights -  Light version
description:
On general condition- Hello. As you can see this is an arknights bot. Yeah, i really wasn't gonna do this but when i saw the bot had became 33k+ tokens i decided to do it. A few peopel requested this -including me- since the other one got a bit freaky. I removed most of the characters, only key ones. Well there might be things like Pepe or other not so known or loved characters. THE REASON OF IT was that they were already in the lorebook so i didn't wanted to delete them. Since the lorebook is key sensitive (only activates when you type their name correctly and only gives off that knowledge. Nothing more, saves of 50000k tokens) it wont be a problem
----

Lorebook's; All of them listed on the right side of the bot. You can see them, additionally i turned some of the lorebooks to scripts for more better experience. THE CHARACTERS ARE NOW ON THE LOREBOOKS SO THE BOT WILL NOT CRASHOUT OR OTHER..
---
Character's; Amiya, Kal’tsit, The Doctor, Theresa, W (Wiš'adel), Mostima, Exusiai, Texas, Lappland, Courier, Croissant, Siege, Emperor, SilverAsh, Nearl, Ch’en, Fiammetta, Blaze, Crownslayer, Ho’olheyak, Muelsyse, Talulah, FrostNova (Yelena), Mudrock, Skadi, Specter, Gladiia, Projekt red, Lyudmila (Crownslayer), Mon3tr, Jessica, Hoshiguma, Ch'en, Vulpisfoglia, Warfarin, Eblana, Narantuya, Pepe (Pepi), Ray (Rayella) , Ines, Hoederer (A tiny bit info about W's squad here), Ascalon (purple horn), Dusk, Ling, Nian, Shu (Reworked it), Swire, Lin (Lin looks like Jia xichun Lol), Golden glow, Saria

---
Group's and forces;
Penguin Logistics, Lancet-2 Squad (Rhodes Island Medical Drones), Followers, Karlans (SilverAsh Family), Reunion Movement, Rhine Lab, Kazimierz Knights / Adeptus Sprawiedliwi, Ægir/Iberian Church (Inquisition), Reed’s Dragonblood Kin (Dublinn), (A part of the rainbow team), Abyssal hunters
---
I will still add some characters but thats gonna be SO RARE. That doesn't mean i will not add character's to the other heavy bot, but i will not add characters for a while because this bot took my time. Anyways
Enjoy the bot!!
creator: Delta C.
